QueryTheListOfRegularSecurityGroupsV2.marker: The starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
QueryTheListOfRegularSecurityGroupsV2.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, typically no more than 1000, default value is 1000
QueryTheListOfRegularSecurityGroupsV2.instanceId: Cloud product instance ID, used to query the list of security groups associated with the instance. Leave blank to query all created security groups.
QueryTheListOfRegularSecurityGroupsV2.vpcId: VPC instance ID, used to query the list of security groups associated with the instance. Required if instanceId is specified.
QueryTheListOfRegularSecurityGroupsV2.securityGroupId: ID of the specific security group to query
QueryTheListOfRegularSecurityGroupsV2.securityGroupIds: IDs of the specific security groups to query, multiple IDs separated by commas
